category_sources: source_facts.description says it analyzes dependencies in compiled Golang binaries; official GitHub README describes a tool to analyze the size of Go compiled binaries.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses go-size-analyzer; source_facts.name is go-size-analyzer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, usage, web mode, output formats, and feature overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Zxilly/go-size-analyzer; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Go binary dependency analysis; official README lists size breakdowns, output formats, web interface, terminal UI, and diff mode.
